member_long_descriptions: Partial, edge-cropped dark brown wooden side table with a rectangular top and carved cabriole-style legs; tabletop shows a green fabric bag and stacked papers, the wood has a slightly worn glossy finish and a visible apron beneath the top — estimated ~0.8 m from the camera.

Square/rectangular black outer frame with a white double mat and glass, containing a centered small sailboat (nautical) print on a pale background; a small sticker or price label is visible on the lower-right of the inner mat and there is mild glare on the glass; entire framed picture is visible in the crop and was likely photographed at approximately 1.0 meter from the camera.

Partial view of a black glossy leather (or faux-leather) three-seat couch with vertically channelled padded backrests, stitched segmented seat cushions and visible creasing; left armrest with a cup-holder is cut off at the image edge — approx. 1.2 m from camera.

Partial close-up of a dark navy-blue pillow showing a rounded top edge and smooth, slightly shiny synthetic fabric; the crop is edge-cut and mildly blurred/low-resolution, and the object appears close to the camera (approximately 0.5–0.8 m).

Close-up of a partial black glossy leather couch backrest showing three vertical padded segments with stitched seams, creases and reflective highlights; crop is edge-cut and shows only the top/back of the cushion and a small right-side detail; approximately 0.8 meters from the camera.

Dark brown leather single-seat recliner with glossy, creased upholstery, wide padded armrests and a high segmented back with visible stitching; appears mostly fully visible and centered in the crop and approximately 1.2 m from the camera.

Close-up of a dark (black to deep brown) leather upholstered chair showing the padded seat cushion and armrest with visible stitched rectangular panels and glossy surface; partial and edge-cropped on the right, with some creasing in the leather, appearing about 0.6 m from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Close-up of a dark (black to deep brown) leather upholstered chair showing the padded seat cushion and armrest with visible stitched rectangular panels and glossy surface; partial and edge-cropped on the right, with some creasing in the leather, appearing about 0.6 m from the camera.

Low-pile beige rectangular area rug with a cream center and a narrow reddish-brown decorative border; woven texture visible and appears floor-laid, with the right and lower edges partially cropped in the image — approximately 1.0 m from the camera.
